67aece6996eae2aa19c6fd2c.question_sanitized: A director with this name used a step printing effect for an enigmatic desert gunfight in which an ex-bounty hunter played by Warren Oates watches the death of his brother, also played by Warren Oates. A writer with this surname wrote a wartime film about Ukrainian guerillas that was re-edited in the 50s to reference the Hungarian Revolution, titled The North Star. A director with this name made Ride in the Whirlwind and The Shooting back-to-back with Jack Nicholson and had the first name Monte. William Wyler directed (*) two different versions of a play by an author with this surname, with the latter pairing Shirley MacClaine and Audrey Hepburn, and the former excising a teacher's lesbian infatuation. For 10 points, give this surname of the author of The Children's Hour.
67aece6996eae2aa19c6fd2c.answer_sanitized: Hellman [accept Monte Hellman; accept Lillian Hellman]

67aece6996eae2aa19c6fd33.question: This is the first character in the title of a David Mamet book on the movie business that extolls the perfection of Galaxy Quest. This character appears in a cartoon title sequence that credits every role to Marv Newland. This character’s environment was designed by the Guangdong-born painter Tyrus Wong. In a 1969 student cartoon, this character is abruptly stepped on by Godzilla. Donnie Dunagan voiced this character, who cowers from lightning during a (*) “Little April Shower.” This character is told how all living things become “twitterpated” in the springtime. This character defeats a rival named Ronno and assumes the title of “Great Prince” after surviving a wildfire. For 10 points, Flower and Thumper are friends of what white-tailed deer?
67aece6996eae2aa19c6fd33.question_sanitized: This is the first character in the title of a David Mamet book on the movie business that extolls the perfection of Galaxy Quest. This character appears in a cartoon title sequence that credits every role to Marv Newland. This character's environment was designed by the Guangdong-born painter Tyrus Wong. In a 1969 student cartoon, this character is abruptly stepped on by Godzilla. Donnie Dunagan voiced this character, who cowers from lightning during a (*) "Little April Shower." This character is told how all living things become "twitterpated" in the springtime. This character defeats a rival named Ronno and assumes the title of "Great Prince" after surviving a wildfire. For 10 points, Flower and Thumper are friends of what white-tailed deer?
67aece6996eae2aa19c6fd33.answer: Bambi [accept Bambi Meets Godzilla; accept Bambi vs Godzilla: On the Nature, Purpose, and Practice of the Movie Business]
67aece6996eae2aa19c6fd33.answer_sanitized: Bambi [accept Bambi Meets Godzilla; accept Bambi vs Godzilla: On the Nature, Purpose, and Practice of the Movie Business]
